title: PUBLIC LIBRARY TEMPORARY REDUCED OPERATING HOURS
summary: The Cordova Public Library will be temporarily reducing operating hours due to a staffing shortage. Operating hours will be Tuesday through Friday 12 – 7 pm and Saturday 12 – 5 pm, until further notice.
